title: Nucor stock rallies after guidance for record earnings that top expectations
text: Shares of Nucor Corp. NUE, +1.29% rallied 2.2% in premarket trading Wednesday, after the steel maker said it expects second-quarter earnings to rise to record levels amid strong end-use market demand. The company expects earnings per share for the quarter to July 2 of $8.75 to $8.85, up from EPS of $5.04 a year ago and above the previous quarterly EPS record of $7.97 in the fourth quarter of 2021.
